name: 12pc Glass Shoreham Double Old Fashion and Highball Glasses Set - Threshold™: Drinking Glasses Set, Dishwasher-Safe
description:
The 12-Piece Glass Shoreham Double Old Fashioned and Highball Glasses Set from Threshold™ is great for everyday use or for special occasions where you'll be entertaining guests. This tastefully simple set blends well with any other glassware you may have at home. The set includes a total of 12 pieces. Six of the glasses have a 16-fluid ounce capacity and six of them have a 13.3-fluid ounce capacity, so you have the versatility of serving elaborate cocktails or just a glass of OJ in the morning. Thanks to the set's dishwasher-safe design, you know that cleanup will be an easy and stress-free process.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
